Local workspace rule:

- upstream content supplies execution-discipline skills, specialist personas, references, hooks, and command patterns
- local orchestration under `skills/codex-parent-session-orchestrator/` and `skills/codex-subagent-orchestrator/` remains authoritative for approval, delegation, parent landing, status reporting, evidence, and acceptance
